title: Intense Italian Silken Tofu Pasta
description: A spicy, dense yet light Italian pasta that blends silky tofu into an emulsified tomato sauce for a shojin-friendly twist.
instructions: Cook spaghetti in salted water until al dente, then reserve a cup of pasta water and drain.
Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat and sauté minced garlic until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add crushed tomatoes, chili flakes, and dried basil to the pan and let the mixture simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Meanwhile, gently press silken tofu to remove excess moisture, then crumble it into the sauce.
Pour in reserved pasta water gradually, stirring until the sauce emulsifies around the tofu, creating a creamy consistency.
Season the sauce with lemon juice; taste and adjust acidity if needed.
Return the cooked spaghetti to the pan and toss it with the tofu sauce until fully coated.
Sprinkle nutritional yeast over the dish for savory depth, then serve hot.
